customers_say: Customers find this smart lock to be an excellent upgrade over traditional door locks, with butter-smooth installation and flawless functionality, including real-time alerts. They appreciate its feature-rich design with multiple unlocking methods, including fingerprint, PIN, and NFC card options, and consider it worth the price. Customers like its appearance, with one noting its rose-gold/black finish, and value its strong security features.

reviews.author: Ajith Kumar Varma
reviews.title: Worth the price and high quality

reviews.author: Manish
reviews.title: Atomsberg Lock Review
reviews.body: The lock was fitted perfectly and installation was done in super smooth manner The service guy Uday was very corporative

reviews.author: Ramesh Bisht
reviews.title: Feedback
reviews.body: Awesome product, nice and smooth installation by suraj.
